query:
ALTER TABLE bookings 
ADD COLUMN paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'paid', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
ADD COLUMN totalAmount DECIMAL(10, 2),
ADD COLUMN paymentDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN stripeSessionId VARCHAR(255);
